ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product model */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company that produces the product */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the product model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the product model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the product model was released */,
  "initial_price" REAL /* Initial price of the product model */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "features" TEXT /* Key features of the product */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period for the product */,
  "discontinued" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the product is discontinued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the company was founded */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company belongs to */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product purchased */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the product was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the product was purchased */,
  "purchase_source" TEXT /* Source of the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the purchase */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered with the company */,
  "loyalty_program" TEXT /* Loyalty program status of the customer */,
  "purchase_history" TEXT /* List of previous purchases made by the customer */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred contact method of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_records" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase associated with the usage record */,
  "months_used" INTEGER /* Number of months the product has been used */,
  "issues_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of issues experienced with the product */,
  "issues_description" TEXT /* Description of the issues experienced with the product */,
  "last_used_date" TEXT /* Date the product was last used */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage */,
  "issues_reported" TEXT /* List of issues reported by the customer */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of issue resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_records_purchase_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_id") REFERENCES purchases ("purchase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resale_values" (
  "resale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resale record */,
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase associated with the resale record */,
  "resale_date" TEXT /* Date the product was resold */,
  "resale_value" REAL /* Resale value of the product */,
  "resale_platform" TEXT /* Platform used for resale */,
  "resale_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the product at resale */,
  "resale_price" REAL /* Resale price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resale_values_purchase_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_id") REFERENCES purchases ("purchase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product model being rated */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company being rated */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "rating_comment" TEXT /* Comment for the rating */,
  "rating_helpfulness" TEXT /* Helpfulness of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase associated with the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the customer feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback */,
  "feedback_topic" TEXT /* Topic of the feedback */,
  "feedback_response" TEXT /* Response to the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_purchase_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_id") REFERENCES purchases ("purchase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered with the system */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
